message:
refactor(components): improve remaining viz components and UI with stricter types and performance

Visualization components:
- commit-coalescer-race, dual-mode-interface, dual-write-pipeline,
  mcp-architecture, territory-map: refine SVG animations, fix TypeScript
  strict mode issues, and improve responsive behavior
- obligation-flow, reliability-internals, stress-gauntlet, token-economy:
  minor type annotation and display fixes
- swarm-simulation, system-topology: improve animation efficiency

UI components:
- spec-viewer: major overhaul with improved search, navigation, section
  rendering, and TypeScript compliance (~470 lines refactored)
- spec-search: simplify search logic and improve keyboard navigation
- client-shell: add animation state management
- glitch-text, glow-orbits: improve animation performance
- hero-media: refine media loading behavior
- sync-elements: improve element synchronization logic
- tooltip: enhance positioning and accessibility
- Various minor suppressions for Next.js strict mode compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
